name: @brain/desktop

scripts.dist: cross-env BUILD_ENV=production electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: cross-env BUILD_ENV=production electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:win: cross-env BUILD_ENV=production electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:linux: cross-env BUILD_ENV=production electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:dev: cross-env BUILD_ENV=development electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:beta: cross-env BUILD_ENV=beta electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:prod: cross-env BUILD_ENV=production electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs

description: A local-first second brain — notes you and your AI agents share.
